fpa_manufacturers.name: Teledyne FLIR
fpa_manufacturers.capacity_note: Dominant Western FPA manufacturer. Designs AND fabs detectors in-house at Goleta CA.
fpa_manufacturers.pie_relevance: CRITICAL — THE NDAA-compliant thermal option for drones. ITAR-free Boson is a major development.

fpa_manufacturers.name: Lynred
fpa_manufacturers.fpa_type: uncooled a-Si and VOx microbolometer, cooled InSb/MCT
fpa_manufacturers.note: World's second largest IR detector manufacturer. Supplies European defense (Thales, Safran). Joint venture between Sofradir and ULIS.
fpa_manufacturers.pie_relevance: HIGH — European alternative to FLIR. Key for allied drone builds.

fpa_manufacturers.name: BAE Systems (IR division)
fpa_manufacturers.note: Makes FPAs for military programs. Not available as OEM drone modules. Powers military EO/IR gimbals.
fpa_manufacturers.pie_relevance: LOW for drone builders — military-only, ITAR controlled

fpa_manufacturers.name: L3Harris (IR division)
fpa_manufacturers.note: Makes complete EO/IR gimbal systems, not bare FPAs. ITAR controlled.
fpa_manufacturers.pie_relevance: MEDIUM — relevant for large defense UAS only

fpa_manufacturers.name: SCD (Semi Conductor Devices)
fpa_manufacturers.note: Israeli FPA manufacturer. Supplies Elbit, Rafael, Controp. Key for Israeli UAS thermal.
fpa_manufacturers.pie_relevance: MEDIUM — Israeli defense ecosystem thermal supplier

fpa_manufacturers.name: InfiRay / IRay Technology / Raytron

sanctions.reason: Supplying Russia with military optics for tanks and armored vehicles

products.note: Drone thermal core, ~1/8 FLIR Boson price

fpa_manufacturers.us_distributor: iRayUSA (Lewisville, TX) — claims separate entity, but parent Raytron controls both InfiRay Outdoor and Yantai iRay
fpa_manufacturers.capacity_note: 38% of global thermal imager shipments (2022, per Yole). Massive production scale.
fpa_manufacturers.pie_relevance: CRITICAL FLAG — sanctioned for Russia supply. Parent Raytron likely produces PLA military optics. Shell company structure obscures relationships.

fpa_manufacturers.name: Hikvision (thermal division)
fpa_manufacturers.note: On BIS Entity List since Oct 2019 for Xinjiang surveillance. Sources FPAs from Guide Infrared or in-house. World's largest video surveillance company.
fpa_manufacturers.pie_relevance: CRITICAL FLAG — Entity List. Any thermal camera with Hikvision FPA is non-compliant.

fpa_manufacturers.name: Dahua Technology (thermal division)
fpa_manufacturers.note: On BIS Entity List since Oct 2019 for Xinjiang surveillance.

fpa_manufacturers.name: Guide Infrared / Dali Technology
fpa_manufacturers.note: Major Chinese FPA manufacturer. Supplies Hikvision and other Chinese thermal brands. Not individually named on Entity List but Chinese military-adjacent.
fpa_manufacturers.pie_relevance: HIGH — upstream FPA supplier to multiple Chinese thermal brands

camera_integrators.name: Obsidian Sensors
camera_integrators.note: US thermal camera company. Makes drone-grade thermal modules. Likely uses own or FLIR FPAs.

camera_integrators.name: Seek Thermal / Seek UAV
camera_integrators.note: US thermal company. Makes own LWIR detectors (12um VOx). Drone-specific Seek UAV line.

camera_integrators.name: Sierra-Olympic Technologies
camera_integrators.note: High-end military thermal. Viento and Ventus lines for drone gimbals.

camera_integrators.name: Workswell
camera_integrators.note: EU thermal camera maker. WIRIS Pro used on Freefly Astro. Uses Lynred FPAs — fully allied supply chain.

camera_integrators.name: Controp Precision Technologies
camera_integrators.note: Israeli defense thermal/EO company. Supplies IDF drone programs.

camera_integrators.name: Elbit Systems
camera_integrators.note: Micro STAMP thermal payload for small UAS.

camera_integrators.name: Aselsan
camera_integrators.note: Turkish defense. Makes own uncooled FPAs. NATO member.

camera_integrators.name: Leonardo DRS
camera_integrators.note: US subsidiary of Leonardo (Italy). Military thermal/EO. ITAR controlled.

camera_integrators.name: Gremsy
camera_integrators.ndaa_note: Vietnam is not a prohibited country. Uses FLIR Boson+ cores.
camera_integrators.note: Drone gimbal maker. New NDAA-compliant payloads with FLIR Boson+ (Lynx, ORUS L).

dji_thermal_sourcing.fpa_source: Likely InfiRay/Guide Infrared or in-house DJI detector
dji_thermal_sourcing.note: DJI does not disclose FPA source. Given Chinese ecosystem integration, almost certainly Chinese FPAs. NOT NDAA compliant at any level.
dji_thermal_sourcing.pie_relevance: Any DJI thermal = Chinese FPA = non-NDAA

itar_status.key_change: 2020 ITAR reform moved most uncooled LWIR cameras from USML Category XII to EAR/Commerce jurisdiction

current_rules.itar_free: Uncooled LWIR (8-14um) cameras below certain performance thresholds — includes FLIR Boson, Boson+, Hadron, Lepton
current_rules.itar_controlled: Cooled MWIR/LWIR cameras, military targeting systems, high-performance seekers (Neutrino LC/SX8, BAE FPAs, L3Harris WESCAM)

itar_status.significance: FLIR Boson being ITAR-free AND NDAA-compliant is a major development — allows export to allies and Blue UAS integration without State Dept license

price_comparison.price_gap: FLIR Boson 640 is 7-9x more expensive than equivalent InfiRay. This price gap drives non-compliant procurement.

regulatory_flags.impact: Sanctioned. iRayUSA claims separate entity but parent Raytron controls both.

regulatory_flags.status: Not individually listed but DJI is effectively banned for federal procurement
regulatory_flags.impact: Chinese FPAs inside make any DJI thermal non-NDAA

summary.ndaa_compliant_options: FLIR Boson/Boson+ (US), Lynred (FR), SCD (IL), Seek Thermal (US), Obsidian (US), Aselsan (TR)
summary.key_finding: FLIR Boson+ is ITAR-free AND NDAA-compliant — the single most important thermal development for Blue UAS. InfiRay/iRay sanctioned May 2024 for Russia supply but still selling in US via shell company structure. 7-9x price gap between FLIR and Chinese alternatives drives non-compliant procurement.
